data.title: BOS Appoints New Leadership Amid Regional Tensions
data.description:
BOS Better Online Solutions ( (BOSC) ) has issued an update.

BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. announced the appointment of Osnat Gur as Board Chair and Avi Dadon as an independent director. This leadership change, announced on March 19, 2025, is expected to bolster BOS’s strategic direction and operational efficiency. Gur, with her extensive experience in B2B marketing and technology, and Dadon, with his background in defense procurement, are poised to enhance the company’s growth and stakeholder value. The announcement comes amid ongoing regional conflicts that could impact BOS’s business operations and financial conditions.

More about BOS Better Online Solutions

BOS Better Online Solutions Ltd. is a global integrator of supply chain technologies, operating through three specialized divisions: Intelligent Robotics, RFID, and Supply Chain. These divisions focus on automating industrial and logistics processes, optimizing inventory management, and integrating components into customer products.

YTD Price Performance: 17.22%

Average Trading Volume: 57,220

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $22.24M

data.title: GreenPower Delivers First Electric School Buses Under EPA Program
data.description:
The latest update is out from GreenPower Motor ( (TSE:GPV) ).

GreenPower Motor Company has announced the delivery of the first four Type D all-electric BEAST school buses to its West Virginia dealer for the Kanawha County School District. This delivery is part of the EPA’s Clean School Bus Program funded by the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which aims to deploy 50 GreenPower buses across seven West Virginia school districts. The initiative highlights GreenPower’s commitment to providing safe and sustainable transportation solutions while emphasizing the importance of strategic collaboration with government officials to ensure effective use of taxpayer dollars.

More about GreenPower Motor

GreenPower Motor Company Inc. is a leading manufacturer and distributor of purpose-built, all-electric, zero-emission medium and heavy-duty vehicles. The company serves the cargo and delivery market, shuttle and transit space, and the school bus sector, focusing on sustainable transportation solutions.

YTD Price Performance: -26.55%

Average Trading Volume: 26,127

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$24.48M

data.title: 01 Communique Strengthens Financial Position and Advances PQC Technologies
data.description:
01 Communique Laboratory Inc. ( (TSE:ONE) ) has provided an announcement.

01 Communique Laboratory Inc. reported its first quarter fiscal 2025 results, highlighting a strengthened balance sheet with a $920,000 private placement. The company is advancing its PQC-compliant technologies, including expanding its IronCAP X product to support multiple platforms and developing a PQC-compliant AI platform. The company also entered a partnership with Real Matter Technology to integrate its IronCAP technology into fintech products. Despite a net loss for the quarter, the company remains confident in its working capital to support its product development roadmap.

More about 01 Communique Laboratory Inc.

01 Communique Laboratory Inc. is a pioneering enterprise-level cybersecurity provider focused on the quantum computing era. The company specializes in post-quantum cryptography (PQC) technologies, aiming to secure sensitive data against quantum attacks. Their market focus includes enterprise end-users and various industries such as cryptocurrencies, nuclear power, remote access software, and finance.

data.title: Nel ASA Secures Key Order for Aberdeen Hydrogen Hub
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from NEL ASA ( (NLLSF) ).

Nel Hydrogen US, a subsidiary of Nel ASA, has secured a purchase order for a 2.5 MW containerized PEM unit for the Aberdeen Hydrogen Hub project in Scotland, a joint venture between bp and Aberdeen City Council. This project, awarded by Hydrasun, marks a significant milestone in the hydrogen market, enhancing the supply chain and showcasing the collaborative capabilities in delivering hydrogen solutions in the UK.

More about NEL ASA

Nel ASA is a leading hydrogen technology company with a global presence, specializing in electrolyser technology for the production of renewable hydrogen and hydrogen fueling equipment for vehicles. Their products support the decarbonization of industries such as transportation, refining, steel, and ammonia.

YTD Price Performance: 16.00%

data.title: Nexus AG Announces Change in Voting Rights
data.description:
NEXUS AG ( (DE:NXU) ) has shared an announcement.

Nexus AG announced a change in voting rights, with The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. reducing its stake in the company. The new total voting rights held by Goldman Sachs now stand at 3.11%, down from the previous 3.65%. This adjustment reflects a decrease in the percentage of voting rights attached to shares, which could impact Nexus AG’s shareholder dynamics and influence in decision-making processes.

More about NEXUS AG

Nexus AG is a company based in Donaueschingen, Germany, and operates in the healthcare industry. They are involved in the development and distribution of software solutions for healthcare organizations, focusing on enhancing operational efficiency and patient care.

data.title: ATAI Life Sciences Diversifies Treasury with Bitcoin Investment
data.description:
An announcement from ATAI Life Sciences ( (ATAI) ) is now available.

On March 20, 2025, ATAI Life Sciences announced its decision to diversify its treasury reserve strategy by investing in Bitcoin, alongside cash and other securities. The company plans an initial investment of $5 million in Bitcoin, which is not expected to affect its drug development timelines or operational runway.

data.title: Eguana Technologies Enhances Strategic Position with Duracell Settlement
data.description:
An announcement from Eguana Technologies ( (TSE:EGT) ) is now available.

Eguana Technologies has reached a settlement with Duracell Power Center, which includes a termination fee and the transfer of finished goods, enhancing Eguana’s inventory for strategic projects. The agreement also provides Eguana with increased manufacturing credit, improving liquidity and reducing working capital needs, thereby strengthening its operational and strategic positioning in the energy storage market.

More about Eguana Technologies

Eguana Technologies Inc. is a leading provider of high-performance energy storage systems, focusing on delivering flexible, modular, and cost-effective alternatives to traditional grid upgrades. Since 1998, the company has been connecting utilities with consumers through its commercial and residential energy storage solutions, designed to facilitate seamless power grid transitions. Eguana’s products are manufactured in North America to ensure compliance and quality, catering to major grid modernization markets.

data.title: A2A SpA Reports Robust Growth and Strategic Investments in 2024
data.description:
A2A SpA ( (IT:A2A) ) has issued an announcement.

A2A SpA reported significant investments of 2,941 million euros in 2024 to develop strategic infrastructures supporting ecological transition, alongside a notable increase in retail customers in the free market electricity segment by 18%. Despite a 13% decline in revenues due to lower commodity prices, the company achieved an 18% growth in EBITDA and a 29% increase in ordinary net profit. The company also proposed a 4.4% increase in dividends per share. A2A’s strategic acquisitions and investments in renewable energy and sustainable finance have strengthened its industry positioning, with 78% of its debt represented by sustainable finance instruments, and a substantial increase in its managed electricity network.

More about A2A SpA

A2A SpA is a company operating in the energy sector, focusing on the ecological transition. The company is involved in the production and distribution of electricity and gas, with a significant emphasis on renewable energy sources and sustainable finance. A2A SpA has a strategic market focus on expanding its infrastructure to support energy transition and sustainability initiatives.

YTD Price Performance: 7.90%

Average Trading Volume: 849,970

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €7.17B
